violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

Eggs in shell was observed held at 60 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed in cooler unit for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer and prep unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
The ceiling tiles in the dining area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Milk was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2023

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of potatoes. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface (floor) that is not clean in the back kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the: 1.prep unit 2.1 door fridge 3.front counter shelving 4.hood (back kitchen) 5.stove(back kitchen) 6.shelves(back kitchen) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023

The floors in the back kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement and outside trash area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023
